steps.action: Clear storage/cookies, navigate to rum-traffic.html with domain/domainkey URL params
steps.expected: Login is skipped and dashboard is shown directly

steps.observed: Performance resource entries include multiple fetch requests to bundles.aem.page endpoints

evidence.network: Resource timing entries show fetch calls to https://bundles.aem.page/bundles/www.aem.live/... with supplied domainkey

assertions.title: Login form appears without URL params

steps.action: Clear storage/cookies and open rum-traffic.html without domain/domainkey params
steps.observed: loginVisible=true, dashboardVisible=false, and URL has no domain/domainkey params

evidence.network: No authenticated data-loading requests observed before login form submission

steps.action: Fill login form with valid domain/domainkey and submit
steps.expected: Login form hides and dashboard appears
Data loading starts after successful auth
steps.observed: Performance resource entries show repeated bundles.aem.page fetch requests

evidence.network: Performance entries captured 6 recent bundles.aem.page fetch requests after successful sign-in

steps.action: Logout, submit login form with invalid domainkey
steps.expected: Error shown and login remains visible
steps.observed: Error text shown: "Authentication failed. Please check your domain and domain key.", loginVisible=true, dashboardVisible=false
Direct browser fetch to bundles endpoint with invalid key returned status 403

steps.action: Sign in with valid credentials from login form
steps.observed: localStorage contains key rum_credentials with domain and domainkey JSON payload

steps.action: Reload page after successful form login
steps.observed: After reload, login hidden and dashboard visible

evidence.network: Post-login dashboard reload completed and remained authenticated

steps.expected: Stored credentials removed and login form shown

evidence.network: Logout action transitioned to unauthenticated state without additional errors

frictions.description: agent-browser `network requests` returned "No requests captured" despite active bundle fetches during page load.
frictions.resolution: Used `performance.getEntriesByType('resource')` for request evidence and a direct browser-side fetch for explicit invalid-key 403 status evidence.

summary: Tested 6 authentication assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
